# CMFormatDescription.Extensions.Value.CameraCalibrationDataLensCollection.ExtrinsicOriginSource

**Enumeration**

Identifies how the origin of the camera system’s extrinsics are determined.

## Declaration

```swift
enum ExtrinsicOriginSource
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **CMFormatDescription.Extensions.Value.CameraCalibrationDataLensCollection.ExtrinsicOriginSource.stereoCameraSystemBaseline**: Center of transform is determined by the point mid way along the dimensions indicated by the StereoCameraSystemBaselineBox held in the StereoCameraSystemBox.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Equatable
- Escapable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
